div1.entryFree: Penitence, repentance: by p. the Eternal's wrath's appeased, Gent. V, 4, 81. paid down more p. than done trespass, Wint. V, 1, 4. and try your p., if it be sound, Meas. II, 3, 22. fear, and not love, begets his p. R2 V, 3, 56. my p. comes after all, H5 IV, 1, 321. repent in bootless p. H6C II, 6, 70.
